positive: A whimsical forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, a sleepy fox, and floating soap bubbles. Style of Studio Ghibli meets detailed watercolor illustration, soft pastel palette, intricate details, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, harsh lines, oversaturation, photo-realistic, digital art, messy composition
